cards.name: SBM Mobikwik First
cards.cash_advance: 2.5% of the amount withdrawn or INR 250 (whichever is higher)
cards.late_fee: 2.5% of the Total Outstanding Amount or INR 200 (whichever is higher)
cards.cash_interest: 3.5% per month or 42% per annum (charged from the transaction date until payment, no interest-free period)
cards.source_section: Fee table p.4, 'Joining fees/Membership fees' & 'Annual Maintenance Fee', SBM Mobikwik First row (waiver criteria N/A)

bank_defaults.interest_free_days: 20 to 50 days (free credit period can range up to 48 days depending on Payment Due Date, incl. 3 days grace)
bank_defaults.source_section: All 8 cards are FD-secured. Charges are now per-card on each card object. Finance/interest rates per card p.5 ('Interest Rate for POS/ECOM after credit free period' & 'Interest Rate for ATM Withdrawal'). Forex/Surcharge table p.6-7. Cash advance fee table p.4 (Table 02). Late payment fee tables p.8-9 (Table 08). Grace period p.6 (sec. v Interest free / Grace Period). Modal secured revolver rate 3.5%pm/42%pa retained in finance_pm/pa_secured.
